title: phaseolus lunatus f. macrocarpus
intro: Phaseolus lunatus f. macrocarpus, also known as the large-seeded flat bean or mottled lima bean, is a type of legume that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestive issues, and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Phaseolus lunatus f. macrocarpus include its potential to aid in weight management, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also consumed raw or cooked as a nutritious and flavorful addition to various dishes.
